title: 📰 Wasabi Protocol drained for $4.5M after deployer admin key compromise
message: Attackers seized Wasabi's deployer key, swapped vault contracts to malicious versions, and drained roughly $4.5M across Ethereum and Base.

title: 📰 AllUnity ports MiCA-compliant EURAU euro stablecoin to Solana
message: DWS-backed AllUnity is taking EURAU multi-chain — the deep-dive on MiCA's EMT track and what licensed euro stablecoins mean for EU on-chain payments.

title: 📰 Bitcoin spot ETFs bleed third straight day at $138M; ether funds shed $88M
message: Three consecutive outflow days led by IBIT and FBTC undercut the April-absorbed-$1.7B framing — the institutional-flow guide on what it signals.

title: 🛠 ETF Tracker — live spot BTC + ETH flow board
message: Watching the third outflow day live? Our ETF tracker surfaces IBIT, FBTC and ETH spot flows so you can see the rotation in real time.

title: 📰 Iran-strike fears hammer crypto: BTC bottoms at $75.7K, ETH at $2.25K week lows
message: Reports of Trump weighing new Iran action sent BTC to its lowest open in a week as Brent crude spiked 7% — the safe-haven framing under a geopolitical shock.

title: 🛠 New tool: Stablecoin Charter Tracker (GENIUS Act issuer status)
message: Live status for who has filed for, received, or is exempt from a federal OCC trust charter under the GENIUS Act — Circle, Agora, Tether USA₮, Paxos, Ripple RLUSD and more.

title: 📰 Lazarus owns April: crypto hack toll crests $620M, 95% from one DPRK crew
message: April 2026 is the worst month for crypto theft since February 2025, with $620M+ drained across 12 incidents and Lazarus behind the two biggest.

title: 📰 GENIUS Act dual-track: $10B threshold splits issuers between state regimes and OCC
message: Treasury's stablecoin framework lets sub-$10B issuers opt into qualifying state regimes while $10B+ issuers move to OCC supervision — the deep-dive on the new classification map.

title: 📰 Banks ask Treasury to delay GENIUS Act 60 days as OCC framework lags
message: Banking groups are lobbying for stacked 60-day comment extensions on three GENIUS Act stablecoin rules — a successful delay drags issuer licensing into late 2026.

title: 📰 Pump.fun pivots to value capture: 50% of revenue, perpetual buyback-burn
message: After years of mercenary memecoin supply, Pump.fun's permanent buyback-and-burn is the most aggressive token-revenue alignment yet from a top-five Solana fee generator.

title: 📰 Pump.fun torches $370M of PUMP, sets new bar for memecoin tokenomics
message: Solana's top memecoin launchpad burned $370M of PUMP and locked in a 50% revenue buyback — the tokenomics deep-dive on what changed.

title: 📰 SEC-CFTC name BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, LINK as digital commodities
message: A joint SEC-CFTC interpretation lays out a unified token taxonomy and explicitly designates the five biggest assets as digital commodities.

title: 📰 Solana Alpenglow targets 150ms finality — 80x faster, votes move off-chain
message: SIMD-0326 rewires Solana consensus to cut block finality from ~12s to ~150ms by moving validator votes off-chain. The deep-dive on what changes for MEV and DEX UX.

title: 📰 Senate market-structure markup slips to May — what the CLARITY Act actually does
message: Tillis confirmed the Senate Banking markup will not happen in April. Inside the CLARITY Act framework — what it codifies for commodities, securities, and DeFi.

title: 📰 BTC closes April defensive at $76K as 30-year yield hits 5% — the macro read
message: 5% long yields and Iran-tied oil pressure are pushing BTC into the May rate-path window. Decision-day playbook for the post-FOMC tape.

title: 📰 DeFi bleeds $606M across 12 exploits in 18 days as Kelp DAO contagion lingers
message: Drift's $285M and Kelp DAO's $293M headlined April's $606M exploit run. Inside the post-mortem cluster — attack paths and lessons for protocol risk.

title: 📰 Coinbase opens WRON-USD spot trading May 1 — Ronin's first US tier-one pair
message: After years of offshore-only liquidity, Ronin's gaming token gets a tier-one US fiat pair. The deep-dive on Sky Mavis, Axie Infinity and gaming-first L2 design.

title: 📰 Spot BTC ETFs pull $1.7B in April as Strategy stacks 56,238 BTC for $4.1B
message: Spot Bitcoin ETFs logged about $1.7B in April net inflows, the largest monthly haul since October 2025, while Strategy added 56,238 BTC.

title: 📰 Inside the SEC-CFTC MoU that paved the way for the 5-asset commodities call
message: How the SEC-CFTC Memorandum of Understanding cleared decades of jurisdictional limbo before this week’s digital-commodity guidance — the institutional backstory.

title: 📰 Powell’s last hold: how the 4-dissent FOMC reshapes the crypto Fed-path read
message: Decision-day playbook for a fractured FOMC and the Powell-exit handover — what it means for BTC, ETH and the rate-cut clock.

title: 📰 SEC-CFTC joint guidance brands BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, LINK as digital commodities
message: A formal commodities tag for the top-five non-stable assets clears the path for spot ETFs, futures listings and bank custody under CFTC primacy — the deep-dive on the new 5-asset taxonomy.

title: 📰 Fed holds at 3.75% with 4 dissents — most since 1992 — as Powell exits May 15
message: The FOMC kept the policy band at 3.75% but four officials dissented, the widest split since 1992, capping Powell's final presser before his May 15 term end.

title: 📰 5-front macro pile-on today: FOMC + ECB + BoE + US Q1 GDP + PCE
message: Five major macro events land in a single tape, with the Fed decision the keystone for crypto risk pricing into May.

title: 📰 MegaETH TGE lands today after years of fast-L2 hype
message: MegaETH ships its token generation event and opens claims, putting the real-time L2 thesis on the public market.

title: 📰 April crypto hacks crack $620M after Kelp DAO and Drift back-to-back drains
message: April losses from crypto exploits topped $620M across 12 incidents, the worst single month since February 2025 and 3x Q1 combined.

title: 📰 FOMC decision lands tomorrow with BTC pinned at $77,794 and bid thinning
message: Bitcoin holds $77,794 into the April 30 FOMC after stalling 2% below Wednesday's $79,388 high as ether, XRP and SOL all close red.

title: 📰 Bitcoin spot volume crashes below $8B — lowest since October 2023
message: Spot BTC volume slipped under $8 billion this week, the thinnest tape since late 2023, leaving prices exposed to violent moves.

title: 📰 DeFi coalition unveils 116,500 rsETH recovery blueprint for $292M Kelp DAO exploit
message: A DeFi United-led group published a step-by-step plan to re-back the 116,500 unbacked rsETH minted in this month's Kelp DAO bridge hack.

title: 📰 Bitcoin slides to $76,340 ahead of Fed as $80K rejection draws third straight failure
message: BTC opened 1.3% lower at $76,340 Wednesday, with Coinbase premium turning negative as traders brace for the Fed decision later today.

title: 📰 Aave bleeds $8.45B in 48 hours as DeFi TVL craters $13B post-KelpDAO
message: Aave depositors yanked $8.45B in two days after attackers used stolen rsETH as collateral, dragging DeFi TVL down $13.21B.
